notes: Converted from the old chapter extraction schema.
Hidden facts, motives, and faction pressures require living-world re-extraction.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed package describes an ongoing battle scene (年流伏诛阵, year beasts attacking Southern Border immortals) which is mostly public/visible events. No private knowledge, secret plans, or future-known information is directly supported by the source pointers. The entities and events are all about the visible trap and combat. No hidden fact candidate can be extracted without speculative extrapolation.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.

The seed shows characters in combat/conflict situations (南疆群仙 fighting 年兽, 方源 setting up a trap), but observed actions are purely combat behaviors without clear motive indicators beyond the obvious survival/combat context. No direct source evidence supports inferring specific motives like fear, desire, or strategic intent. Characters like 铁区中 fighting年兽 or 夏槎 ordering to kill年兽 show only tactical responses to immediate threat, not deeper motives. 陆畏因 and 夏槎 are described as silent/staring coldly - no motive expressed. Would need more narrative context to infer character motives safely.
Merged second-stage living-world enrichment; still requires expert/manual review.
南疆群仙（南疆蛊仙群体）被方源诱入年流伏诛阵，面临年兽围攻和阵法湮灭威胁，是明确的集体生存压力。陆畏因、夏槎为八转领袖，铁区中、刘浩、巴家蛊仙、柴家蛊仙、商虎杖等均为南疆群仙成员，来源充分。压力轴为生存/突围压力，likelyReactions为保守的一步反应。
IF export filter quarantined 5 legacy old-schema branches.
Faction pressure subject filter quarantined 1 pressure candidates under policy reviewable.
